channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in PHP (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in PHP nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐘 shipfastlabs/parsel (326 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: shipfastlabs

📝 Repository: shipfastlabs/parsel

📄 Descrizione: A fast, helpful, and open-source document parser for PHP

⭐ Stelle: 326

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: docs ocr pdf text-extarction

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-29T14:48:28Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-26T12:30:10Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐘 gcoyerk/quickbooks-windows-master (282 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: gcoyerk

📝 Repository: gcoyerk/quickbooks-windows-master

📄 Descrizione: Toolkit for integrating applications with QuickBooks Desktop on Windows using QuickBooks Web Connector. Supports automated data exchange, customer synchronization, invoices, payments, and accounting workflows.

⭐ Stelle: 282

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: accounting automation bookkeeping crm customer-sync erp integration invoice-sync payment-sync php qbook qbxml quickbooks quickbooks-desktop quickbooks-integration quickbooks-web-connector windows

📜 Licenza: Eclipse Public License 1.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-15T17:48:41Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-23T17:59:49Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:

📄 Descrizione: A driver-agnostic control center for Laravel queues, jobs, commands & scheduler — plus whole-app APM, tracing, job batches, metrics, alerts and uptime. Self-hosted, production-safe.

item.description:
👤 Owner: RomaLytar

📝 Repository: RomaLytar/yammi-audit-log

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

item.title: 🐘 iamjohnwhite/bricks-floating-panels (25 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: iamjohnwhite

📝 Repository: iamjohnwhite/bricks-floating-panels

📄 Descrizione: A plugin that helps extend Bricks Builder into having a floating settings and structure editor while making page edits to help free up screen space.
